testcase.name: test_anonym_filter
testcase.failure:
self = <test_proxy.TestProxy testMethod=test_anonym_filter>
def test_anonym_filter(self): test1 = FreeProxy() cnt1 = len(test1.get_proxy_list(repeat=False)) test2 = FreeProxy(anonym=True) cnt2 = len(test2.get_proxy_list(repeat=False)) > self.assertTrue(cnt2 < cnt1) E AssertionError: False is not true
test_proxy.py:29: AssertionError

testcase.failure:
self = <test_proxy.TestProxy testMethod=test_elite_filter>
def test_elite_filter(self): test1 = FreeProxy() cnt1 = len(test1.get_proxy_list(repeat=False)) test2 = FreeProxy(elite=True) cnt2 = len(test2.get_proxy_list(repeat=False)) > self.assertTrue(cnt2 < cnt1) E AssertionError: False is not true
test_proxy.py:36: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_google_filter
testcase.failure:
self = <test_proxy.TestProxy testMethod=test_google_filter>
def test_google_filter(self): test1 = FreeProxy() cnt1 = len(test1.get_proxy_list(repeat=False)) test2 = FreeProxy(google=True) test3 = FreeProxy(google=False) cnt2 = len(test2.get_proxy_list(repeat=False)) cnt3 = len(test3.get_proxy_list(repeat=False)) > self.assertTrue(cnt2 < cnt1) E AssertionError: False is not true
test_proxy.py:45: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_invalid_proxy

failure.message: TypeError: get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'proxies'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_proxy.TestProxy testMethod=test_invalid_proxy>
def test_invalid_proxy(self): test = FreeProxy() test.get_proxy_list = MagicMock(return_value=['111.111.11:2222']) > self.assertRaisesRegex( FreeProxyException, 'There are no working proxies at this time.', test.get)
test_proxy.py:21: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ fp/fp.py:78: in get working_proxy = self.__check_if_proxy_is_working(proxies) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def __check_if_proxy_is_working(self, proxies): url = f'{self.schema}://{self.url}' ip = proxies[self.schema].split(':')[1][2:] > with httpx.get(url, proxies=proxies, timeout=self.timeout) as r: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'proxies'
fp/fp.py:93: TypeError
